DISCOVERY 302, TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. PLAINTIFFS JOAO MARQUES AND VITORIO CAVAZZINI'S MOTION TO COMPEL THE ATTENDANCE OF DEFENDAN AT DEPOSITION AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. NO OPPOSITION FILED THE MOTION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT MAUREEN O'NEILL SHALL APPEAR FOR A DEPOSITION NO LATER THAN MAY 15, 2012. COURT AWARDS SANCTIONS IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFFS IN THE AMOUNT OF $750. (PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER.) PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID MCDONALD, NOT REPORTED.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PLAINTIFFS JOAO MARQUES AND VITORIO CAVAZZINI'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION AGAINST MAUREEN O'NEILL IS GRANTED, $27,000 PLUS INTEREST, ATTORNEY FEES, AND COSTS TOTALLING $660. NO EVIDENCE THE $25,000 WAS CALCULATED TO BE PAID AND RECEIVED BY JUNE 20, 2012 BY PLAINTIFF. REPAIRS DUE MAY 24, 2012. DOOR SHALL BE INSTALLED WITHIN 30 DAYS. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. SMITH, NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation Against Maureen O'Neill
Off Calendar Feb-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Hall (415-512-9865) of MC Hall & Associatesmoving party; No other appearance

The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: PLAINTIFFS JOAO MARQUES and VITORIO CAVAZZINI'S Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation Against Maureen O'Neill is granted,
$27,000 plus interest, attorney fees, and costs totalling $660. No Evidence the $25,000 was calculated to be paid and received by June 20, 2012 by plaintiff. Repairs due May 24, 2012. Door shall be installed within 30 days. Order and judgment signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-08-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-02-13 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-21-2012 Continued To Jun-25-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Mtn To Compel The Attendance Of Deft And Req For Monetary Snctions
Off Calendar Apr-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
PLAINTIFFS JOAO MARQUES AND VITORIO CAVAZZINI'S MOTION To Compel The Attendance Of Defendan at deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions.
No opposition filed the motion is granted. Defendant Maureen O'Neill shall appear for a deposition no later than May 15, 2012. Court awards sanctions in favor of Plaintiffs in the amount of $750. (Prevailing party to submit a form of order.) Pro Tem Judge: David McDonald, not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2011 Set For Trial On May-07-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
